subcodes.first_line: O Há, hearken unto the Call of Bahá, and counsel the servants to trustworthiness and godliness, to truthfulness and purity. By My life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حاء اسمع ندآء البهاء و وص العباد بالامانه و الدیانه و الصدق و الصفاء لعمری سوف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @exhortations and counsels, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
